meaning: n.[圣经] 希伯来的先知,俄巴底亚书
examples: Ezer the first, Obadiah the second, Eliab the third.
So Obadiah went to meet Ahab and told him, and Ahab went to meet Elijah.
The sons of Izrahiah: Michael, Obadiah, Joel and Isshiah. All five of them were chiefs.
But Tony is rescued by a loyal friend and recovers to chase Obadiah and defeat him.
However, his business partner, Obadiah Stane (a splendidly bald, bearded Jeff Bridges), is unhappy about the change.
